alpha.url: The property consists of a primary structure situated within a developed site containing paved vehicle circulation and parking areas. Multiple access points connect the property to surrounding roadways. Additional paved surfaces, landscaped sections, and supporting site features are visible throughout the property and adjacent developed areas.

bravo.url: The view shows the primary structure surrounded by paved circulation and parking areas. Driveways provide access between the site and surrounding roadways. Additional developed features, landscaped sections, and neighboring structures are visible around the property.

charlie.url: The view shows the primary structure positioned within a developed area containing paved vehicle circulation routes and parking areas. Multiple access points connect the site to adjacent roadways. Additional paved surfaces, landscaped areas, and surrounding developed features are visible throughout the site.

delta.url: The view shows the primary structure bordered by paved circulation and parking areas on multiple sides. Vehicle access is provided through several driveways connecting to surrounding roadways. Additional site features, landscaped sections, and neighboring developed properties are visible adjacent to the structure.
